title: chloraea cogniauxii
intro: Chloraea cogniauxii, also known as the greenhood orchid, is a species of orchid native to New Zealand. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat skin conditions such as eczema and acne due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Chloraea cogniauxii include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, making it a valuable resource for traditional medicine. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create a topical treatment for skin issues.
